message:
fix(demo): eliminate scroll flashing via composite/paint optimizations

- Replace will-change:transform on blurred glow rings with contain:strict
  + backface-visibility:hidden to avoid oversized compositing layers
- Remove opacity animation from glow orb keyframes (repaints blurred elements)
- Change .reveal from opacity:0 to opacity:0.01 to avoid layer teardown flash
- Replace transition:all on cards/buttons/outcome-cards with specific properties
- Reduce nav backdrop-filter blur 16px->8px, increase opacity for less compositing
- Switch scroll progress bar from width animation to transform:scaleX (GPU-only)
- Throttle scroll handler with requestAnimationFrame
- Cache DOM queries (nav links, buttons) outside scroll handler
- Add contain:layout style to sections to prevent cross-section paint propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
